---
title: "IFCD0210 Sprint Backlog"
categories: [ifcd0210, backlog]
toc: true
number-sections: false
format:
  html
filters:
   - lightbox
lightbox: true
---

<style>

.heatMap th { background:  #f4f4f4;}
tr:nth-child(3) {background-color: #f4f4f4;}
th, td {
  padding: 8px;
  text-align: left;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
}

tr:hover {background-color:  #f4f4f4;}

</style>

![Sprint Backlog](/images/home/backlog.jpg){width="30%"}

<div class="heatMap">

::: {.column-page-right}

##  ``Sprint#14: ApartmentPredictor Full-Architecture VII`` (March 2026)

| # | Day | Date | Topics |  Details Topics |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
|  **14**  | 47 | 16/03/2026 | - Sprint#14: ApartmentPredictor  Full-Architecture VII </br></br>  - Java Spring Boot: </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction_masterDoc: **v4** </br> (2) Pagination and Pageable </br> (3) Testing Postman </br>  (4) **Cascade** definition for `Apartment`  </br> </br>  ++ React: MUI React `Pagination`: Stack, Pagination, TableContainer | - [ApartmentPrediction: c30e4d3](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/tree/c30e4d391e40ad3f54aff622595876df6b654b81){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [ApartmentPrediction: 99d9d6d](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/tree/99d9d6d8a14fa95ab83f64072dabec686afa2584){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [orphanremoval-and-cascade](https://albertprofe.dev/springboot/sblab8-4.html#orphanremoval-and-cascade){.external target='_blank'}  </br> </br> - [Paging and Sorting](https://docs.spring.io/spring-data/jpa/reference/repositories/query-methods-details.html#repositories.paging-and-sorting){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [Pagination](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/userBorrowBookPagination/blob/master/docs/pagination.md){.external target='_blank'} </br> [- Pageable: repo](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/BooksPageable){.external target='_blank'} </br> ![userBorrowBookPagination repo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AlbertProfe/userBorrowBookPagination/refs/heads/master/docs/jparepository.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}</br> - [apartment-predictor_v4.jar](https://albertprofedocs.s3.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/java_jar/apartment-predictor_v4.jar){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [PaginatedBooks.jsx](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/userBorrowBookFront/blob/master/userBorrowBookFront/src/books/PaginatedBooks.jsx){.external target='_blank'} ![](/images/ifcd0210-26/booksPaginated.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </br> - [MUI react-pagination](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-pagination/){.external target='_blank'} |
|   | 48 | 17/03/2026 |  - Java Spring Boot: </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction_masterDoc: **v4** </br> (2) **Pagination and Pageable** </br> (3) Testing Postman </br>  (4) Cascade definition for `Apartment`  | - [ApartmentPrediction: xxxxxx](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/tree/){.external target='_blank'}   </br> </br> - [Paging and Sorting](https://docs.spring.io/spring-data/jpa/reference/repositories/query-methods-details.html#repositories.paging-and-sorting){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [Pagination](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/userBorrowBookPagination/blob/master/docs/pagination.md){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Pageable: repo](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/BooksPageable){.external target='_blank'} </br>  |
|   |    | | |
|   | 49 | 19/03/2026 |  - Java Spring Boot: </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction_masterDoc: **v5** </br> (2) Pagination and Pageable </br> (3) Testing Postman </br>  (4) Cascade definition for `Apartment` </br> (5) **Queries** | - [ApartmentPrediction:xxxxxx](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/tree/){.external target='_blank'} </br></br> - [JPA Query Methods :: Spring Data JPA](https://docs.spring.io/spring-data/jpa/reference/jpa/query-methods.html#jpa.query-methods.query-creation) </br> - [Spring Boot: JPA Queries – albertprofe wiki](https://albertprofe.dev/springboot/boot-concepts-jpa-4.html) </br> |
|   | 50 | 20/03/2026 |  - Java Spring Boot: </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction_masterDoc: **v5** </br> (2) Pagination and Pageable </br> (3) Testing Postman </br>  (4) Cascade definition for `Apartment` </br> (5) Queries   | - [ApartmentPrediction: xxxxxx](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/tree/){.external target='_blank'} </br></br> - [JPA Query Methods :: Spring Data JPA](https://docs.spring.io/spring-data/jpa/reference/jpa/query-methods.html#jpa.query-methods.query-creation) </br> - [Spring Boot: JPA Queries – albertprofe wiki](https://albertprofe.dev/springboot/boot-concepts-jpa-4.html) </br> |
: Backlog Sprint#14 March 2026 {tbl-colwidths="[2,2,2,55,39]"}
:::

</div>

::: {.callout-note}
- `---------` <s>topic pending</s>
- `-` topic done in class
- `++` new topic not planned
:::
